rationale: Item 19 reports on Mature Franchised System Restaurants — restaurants that operate under the same franchise agreements and fee structures as current new franchisees. The royalty rate (6.0%/6.5%), advertising fund rate (4.75%), and technology fees are uniformly applicable. The Item 19 cohort uses the same fee structure as offered to new franchisees. However, the FPR reports only Gross Sales (top-line revenue) and does not present any cost-adjusted or fee-burden-adjusted performance metric, so fee-level comparability is not a factor in the FPR as presented.
note: The FPR excludes DBR/FCD concept types, which are the newer formats most actively offered. A prospective DBR/FCD franchisee has no Item 19 performance data for their concept type.
